title: festuca ovina var. ochroleuca
intro: Festuca ovina var. ochroleuca, also known as golden fescue, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. ochroleuca include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being.
